summary: For addressing Class II Div. 1 malocclusions characterized by horizontal growth tendencies, high-pull headgear effectively promotes proper alignment by applying targeted corrective force directly at the cranium level. \boxed{\text{high-pull headgear}} The summary highlights that high-pull headgear is optimal for correcting Class II Div. 1 malocclusions with horizontal growth because it provides effective anterior traction from the cranial base, aligning both jaws as needed during orthodontic therapy. \boxed{\text{high-pull headgear}}
